positive: Minimalist celestial cityscape silhouette, featuring stylized constellations, abstract glowing nebulas in deep teal and vibrant gold, and a serene crescent moon over geometric mountain peaks. The design should be highly graphic and suitable for screen printing on apparel. Emphasize clean, sharp lines and strong contrast against a solid background color. Style: Modern cosmic geometry, detailed linework, flat vector art aesthetic. Composition: Centered, highly symmetrical. Lighting: Dramatic silhouette effect with internal glow emanating from the cosmic elements. Color Palette: Teal, Gold, Midnight Blue, and Black.
